title: Terson family
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Terson family''' was a [[Coruscanti/Legends|Coruscanti]] family consisting of [[Hasville Terson]] and his wife [[Adray Terson|Adray]], owners of the [[Air taxi/Legends|air taxi]] firm [[Terson Comfort Carriers]], and their son [[Hasray Terson|Hasray]].

As the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]] approached [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]], Hasville and Adray prepared an escape ship, the ''[[Ugly Truth]]'', hidden within their apartment high up in one of [[Galactic City/Legends|Galactic City's]] massive skyscrapers. Hasray was subsequently captured by a [[Yuuzhan Vong]] [[war party]], led by [[Denua Ku]] and [[Viqi Shesh]].

Denua Ku killed Hasray with barely a thought, but not before the boy had alerted Viqi to the existence of the ''Ugly Truth'' near the Terson family apartment. The ship later enabled [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] and his team of [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knights]] and [[Wraith Squadron]] personnel to escape Coruscant and return to [[Borleias/Legends|Borleias]].

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Enemy Lines II: Rebel Stand]]'' {{1st}}
